title: Enforce release checklist rule in tooling
summary: Adds automated release evidence validation in the coordination repo so completed execution items require proof for code, tests, docs, examples, and smoke validation.
completed_todo_items: Enforce release checklist rule: code + tests + docs + example + smoke/visibility gate before marking items done

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Validator run against the checklist-completing change.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the release evidence workflow, validator script, tests, manifest, and EXECUTION_TODO checklist update if the gate blocks legitimate changes.
